# Travel Hacking Toolkit

> A comprehensive toolkit for searching flights, hotels, and award availability across multiple sources. Combines cash pricing (Duffel, Ignav), award search (seats.aero), portal pay-with-points (Chase UR, Amex MR), corporate-perks pricing (TicketsAtWork), and transfer partner optimization into unified comparison tools. Designed for use by AI coding assistants and agents (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex).

Key concepts:
- **Cash prices** come from GDS feeds (Duffel, Ignav) and are bookable fares
- **Award prices** come from loyalty program availability (seats.aero) and require transferring credit card points
- **Portal prices** come from Chase and Amex travel portals and let you pay with UR/MR points directly
- **Corporate-perks prices** come from EBG-backed sites (TicketsAtWork, Working Advantage, Plum, Beneplace) and often beat public rates 10-30%
- **Transfer partners** map credit card points to airline/hotel loyalty programs at various ratios
- **CPP (cents per point)** measures redemption value. Higher CPP = better use of points

Skill listings below are auto-generated from `skills/*/SKILL.md` frontmatter by `scripts/gen-skill-tables.sh`. Do not hand-edit between BEGIN/END markers.

## Orchestration (start here)

<!-- BEGIN: llms:orchestration -->
- [Award Calendar](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/award-calendar/SKILL.md): Cheapest award dates for a route across a date range. Calendar grid view.
- [Compare Flights](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/compare-flights/SKILL.md): Unified flight comparison across ALL sources in parallel. Auto-applies transfer optimization.
- [Compare Hotels](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/compare-hotels/SKILL.md): Unified hotel comparison across portals, metasearch, and Airbnb. FHR/Edit stacking detection.
- [Trip Calculator](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/trip-calculator/SKILL.md): Cash vs points decision answered with math. Transfer ratios, taxes, opportunity cost.
- [Trip Planner](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/trip-planner/SKILL.md): Full trip planning. Flights + hotels + points in one shot.
<!-- END: llms:orchestration -->

## Flights

<!-- BEGIN: llms:flights -->
- [Duffel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/duffel/SKILL.md): Primary cash prices. Real GDS per-fare-class data.
- [Google Flights](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/google-flights/SKILL.md): Browser-automated Google Flights. All airlines including Southwest.
- [Ignav](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/ignav/SKILL.md): Fast REST API cash prices. Market selection for arbitrage.
- [Seatmaps](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/seatmaps/SKILL.md): Aircraft seat maps, cabin dimensions, seat recommendations.
- [Seats Aero](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/seats-aero/SKILL.md): Award availability across 27 mileage programs.
- [Southwest](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/southwest/SKILL.md): SW fare classes, points pricing, Companion Pass. Change flight price drop monitor. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/sw-fares`.
<!-- END: llms:flights -->

## Credit Card Travel Portals

<!-- BEGIN: llms:portals -->
- [Amex Travel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/amex-travel/SKILL.md): Amex MR portal for flights, hotels, IAP discounts, FHR/THC benefits. Requires Platinum. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/amex-travel`.
- [Bilt](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/bilt/SKILL.md): Bilt Rewards travel portal for hotels and flights. 1.25 cpp on Bilt Points. Home Away From Home properties give $300+ in benefits to Gold/Platinum members.
- [Chase Travel](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/chase-travel/SKILL.md): Chase UR portal for flights, hotels, Points Boost, Edit benefits. Requires Sapphire. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/chase-travel`.
<!-- END: llms:portals -->

## Hotels and Accommodation

<!-- BEGIN: llms:hotels -->
- [Premium Hotels](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/premium-hotels/SKILL.md): Search 4,659 Amex FHR/THC + Chase Edit hotels by city. Stacking opportunities.
- [Rapidapi](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/rapidapi/SKILL.md): Booking.com hotel prices.
- [Serpapi](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/serpapi/SKILL.md): Google Hotels search and destination discovery.
- [Ticketsatwork](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/ticketsatwork/SKILL.md): TicketsAtWork (EBG) corporate-perks portal. Hotels, theme park tickets, attractions, live events. Often beats portals by 10-30%. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/ticketsatwork`.
<!-- END: llms:hotels -->

## Loyalty and Points

<!-- BEGIN: llms:loyalty -->
- [American Airlines](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/american-airlines/SKILL.md): AAdvantage balance and elite status. AwardWallet does not support AA. Docker: `ghcr.io/borski/aa-miles-check`.
- [Awardwallet](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/awardwallet/SKILL.md): All loyalty balances, elite status, history.
- [Transfer Partners](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/transfer-partners/SKILL.md): Cheapest transfer path from credit card points to mileage programs.
- [Wheretocredit](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/wheretocredit/SKILL.md): Mileage earning rates by airline and booking class across 50+ programs.
<!-- END: llms:loyalty -->

## Destinations and Transit

<!-- BEGIN: llms:destinations -->
- [Atlas Obscura](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/atlas-obscura/SKILL.md): Hidden gems and unusual attractions near any destination.
- [Scandinavia Transit](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/scandinavia-transit/SKILL.md): Trains, buses, ferries in Norway, Sweden, and Denmark. Includes Danish fare/zone pricing.
- [Tripadvisor](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/tripadvisor/SKILL.md): Hotel ratings, restaurant search, attraction reviews, nearby search. 5K calls/month.
<!-- END: llms:destinations -->

## Reference and Operations (auto-load on demand)

These skills carry institutional knowledge that the agent loads when triggered. They cover the workflow rules, reference tables, failure recovery, and lessons learned that prevent the most common mistakes.

<!-- BEGIN: llms:reference -->
- [Alliances](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/alliances/SKILL.md): Star Alliance, oneworld, SkyTeam membership and recent shifts (SAS to SkyTeam, ITA to Star, Hawaiian/Fiji to oneworld). Key cross-alliance booking relationships.
- [Award Sweet Spots](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/award-sweet-spots/SKILL.md): Catalog of legendary, excellent, and good award redemptions with current rates and devaluation history.
- [Booking Guidance](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/booking-guidance/SKILL.md): The booking flow, hold-before-transfer rule, phone numbers for major programs.
- [Cabin Codes](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/cabin-codes/SKILL.md): IATA cabin codes (F/J/W/Y) and saver fare class codes (X/I/O) for partner-bookable inventory.
- [Fallback And Resilience](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/fallback-and-resilience/SKILL.md): What to do when each tool fails. Tool-by-tool fallback paths.
- [Flight Search Strategy](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/flight-search-strategy/SKILL.md): The canonical multi-source search workflow. Source priority (Duffel > Ignav > Google Flights > others), market selection for international routes, source accuracy hierarchy, common failure modes.
- [Hotel Chains](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/hotel-chains/SKILL.md): Maps brand names (Westin, Holiday Inn, etc.) to chain families and loyalty programs.
- [Lessons Learned](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/lessons-learned/SKILL.md): Hard-won knowledge from real searches. The mandatory Seats.aero workflow, Southwest specifics, Companion Pass math, source accuracy, small-market caveats, Duffel limitations. Load before any award flight search.
- [Partner Awards](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/partner-awards/SKILL.md): Which programs ticket which airlines (alliance + bilateral). Cross-references credit card currencies to booking programs. Reachability workflow.
- [Points Valuations](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/skills/points-valuations/SKILL.md): CPP formula, floor/ceiling rules, surcharge-heavy programs to avoid, transfer bonus considerations, Chase Points Boost dynamics, opportunity cost.
<!-- END: llms:reference -->

## Docker Images

All images are public on GitHub Container Registry. Pull with `docker pull ghcr.io/borski/<name>:latest`.

- `ghcr.io/borski/patchright-docker`: Base image. Patchright + Chromium + xvfb. All other browser-skill images build on this.
- `ghcr.io/borski/sw-fares`: Southwest skill (search + change-flight monitor).
- `ghcr.io/borski/aa-miles-check`: American Airlines skill (AAdvantage balance + status).
- `ghcr.io/borski/chase-travel`: Chase UR travel portal.
- `ghcr.io/borski/amex-travel`: Amex MR travel portal.
- `ghcr.io/borski/ticketsatwork`: TaW / Working Advantage / Plum / Beneplace EBG portal.

## Data Files

Local JSON data referenced by skills. No API keys required.

- [Transfer Partners](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/transfer-partners.json): Credit card to loyalty program transfer ratios from 6 issuers.
- [Points Valuations](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/points-valuations.json): CPP floor/ceiling per program from 4 sources (TPG, Upgraded Points, OMAAT, VFTW).
- [Alliances](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/alliances.json): Star Alliance, oneworld, SkyTeam membership and key booking relationships.
- [Partner Awards](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/partner-awards.json): Which programs ticket which airlines, including cross-alliance bilateral partnerships.
- [Sweet Spots](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/sweet-spots.json): Legendary, excellent, and good award redemptions plus airline release windows.
- [Hotel Chains](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/hotel-chains.json): Brand to loyalty program mapping with quick-lookup index.
- [FHR Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/fhr-properties.json): Amex Fine Hotels & Resorts property database with coordinates and benefits.
- [THC Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/thc-properties.json): Amex The Hotel Collection property database.
- [Chase Edit Properties](https://github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit/blob/main/data/chase-edit-properties.json): Chase Sapphire Reserve Hotel Collection properties.
